TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kaudipan śó©ŚĻīÁĒüśīĽ == Sasepiya (kamu nu Hulam: ŤééŚ£ęśĮĒšļě) itida i Yafuhepan' Sete'lafu nilecuha a maudip, sabaw tu walu a mihcaan atu ci Anni. Hase'wia maleacawa, tatulu kuni lecuhan nuheni tu wawa, Susanna', maapiay ci Hamunete' atu ci Cudise . 16 .hedek tu sabaw tu enem katukuh sabaw tu pitu nu tusa a bataan tu pina ci Sasepiya itida i Luntun malingatu malaheci kuni kasikawawan, caay kaw migikiay cinida, matinengay misulit tu gagikian, u kunnei taken cuntuno nu mikabuay a tademaw, nikudan sumad han tu Kuowan cituno. 1613ŚĻīŚ∑¶ŚŹ≥, . cacay a malebut enem a lasubu cacay a bataan idaw ku tulu a mihcaan,ci Sasepiya mituasiw taluma cinida i Yafunhepan Sete'late'hu, nikudan nu tuluay a mihcaan mapatay. nika udipan ni Sasepiya anikilukan caay kahacica, nika udipan nida, palutatengaan tu kiwkay, atu natangahan nida nidaay hakiya anisulitan sa. 1590ŚĻīŚąį1613 . cacay a malebut lima a lasubu siwa a bataan (1590) a mihcaan katukuh i cacay a malebut enem a lasubu cacay a bataan idaw ku tulu (1613) a mihcaan ci Sasepiya a natangahan a sakaadihan nu zitay. sayaway anisulitan nida u pakalaluwahluwahay a gikian atu nu likisi a gikian, i sabaw tu enem a hedek nu secian makatukuh tu i tunduh atu nalimaan a tuntunduhan. kilul satu katukuh tu cacay a malebut enem a lasubu idaw ku walu a mihcaan u sakalaluman tu ku sulitan nida, Sasepiya nika siidaay anikaudip, hinasulit cinida tu kinabakah atu sakayedis, u sakapahay nu igu a cudadan. sadikuday tu nikaudipan, malingatu cinida misulit tu kanamuhan kalaluman a sasulitan, singangan naca tu mahicaay kiya a nisulitan, mapapaliw atu dumaay nu misulitay a tademaw. inika udipan nida, hatudaay tu nisulitan nida yadah ku mahicaay ku sakatahekal, caay namin ka hicahica. . maudip henay ci Sasepiya katinengan nu tademaw u sezen atu matinengay migiki misulitay tu cudad a tademaw, nika katukuh tu sabaw tu siwa a secian yadatu i tungduh ku ngangan nida. itini i tusa a bataan a secian makatukuh tu ku ngangan nida i Ya,Fe, Latanmaicuo tulu a kitidaan, yadah satu ku matinengay cinidaan. . lanmancui a zitay manamuh tu tineng ni Sasepiya , Widuoliya a zitay kasenengan kasikadan cinida, mahiya ci Ciwpuona kanamuhan ci Sasepiya . pilecuhan ni Sasepiya .a luma', sumaden mala ka kiningan Weylen. Sasepiya wama nida ci Yehan. Sasepiya mautunasiay a misiwbaya a tademaw atu cigiing, aenengan sa i Senite'ede , wina ci Mali.aten siidaay nu luma' a wawa. . Sasepiya a zitay picudadan caay kaw mahicaay ku nipicudad, nika hamin nu Ingkelan anisikian tu sapicudad u fulic ku sipucay, cacudadan patideng tu Latingu atu kutinwensia pakaicelan tu micudaday. Saka tusa a demiad. . cunci misulitay a tademaw musakamu tu nina zitayan a nikaydaan,yadah kunipatahkalkan tu pacebaay nu ka kungkuan. sabaw tu walu a secian a kungku ci Sasepiya mala Luntun a gagikian tademaw sa malingatu migiki cinida.476 Yehan.Awpuli masakamu ci Sasepiya u inakaay a saysaydan. šłÄšļõ20 ".saan i tusa a bataan a secian musakamu ku siace ci Sasepiya an amala Lankai siacun a Yalisanta.huotun malasaysaydan, ci Huotun palutatengaan nida tu tapang han u tincuciw, itida i nipadikudan nida a nakamuan patahekalan nida kina tademaw ci "Wilen, Sasepiya". malalitin tu ihekalay atu zumaay a natinengan
S.PHON: == kaudipan **** == sas…ôpija (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: ****) itida i jafuńß…ôpan Ē~ ° s…ôt…ô Ē~ °r~…ĺafu nir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßa a maudip, sabaw tu war~…ĺu a mińß ¶aan atu ¶i anni. ńßas…ô Ē~ °wia mar~…ĺ…ôa ¶awa, tatur~…ĺu kuni r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan nuńß…ôni tu wawa, susanna Ē~ °, maapiaj ¶i ńßamun…ôt…ô Ē~ ° atu ¶i ¶udis…ô . ** .ńß…ôd…ôk tu sabaw tu …ôn…ôm katukuńß sabaw tu pitu nu tusa a bataan tu pina ¶i sas…ôpija itida i r~…ĺuntun mar~…ĺiŇčatu mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i kuni kasikawawan, ¶aaj kaw migikiaj ¶inida, matin…ôŇčaj misur~…ĺit tu gagikian, u kunn…ôi tak…ôn ¶untuno nu mikabuaj a tad…ômaw, nikudan sumad ńßan tu kuowan ¶ituno. *******, . ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut …ôn…ôm a r~…ĺasubu ¶a ¶aj a bataan idaw ku tur~…ĺu a mińß ¶aan, ¶i sas…ôpija mituasiw tar~…ĺuma ¶inida i jafunńß…ôpan s…ôt…ô Ē~ °r~…ĺat…ô Ē~ °ńßu, nikudan nu tur~…ĺuaj a mińß ¶aan mapataj. nika udipan ni sas…ôpija anikir~…ĺukan ¶aaj kańßa ¶i ¶a, nika udipan nida, par~…ĺutat…ôŇčaan tu kiwkaj, atu nataŇčańßan nida nidaaj ńßakija anisur~…ĺitan sa. ********** . ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut r~…ĺima a r~…ĺasubu siwa a bataan (****) a mińß ¶aan katukuńß i ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut …ôn…ôm a r~…ĺasubu ¶a ¶aj a bataan idaw ku tur~…ĺu (****) a mińß ¶aan ¶i sas…ôpija a nataŇčańßan a sakaadińßan nu zitaj. sajawaj anisur~…ĺitan nida u pakar~…ĺar~…ĺuwańßr~…ĺuwańßaj a gikian atu nu r~…ĺikisi a gikian, i sabaw tu …ôn…ôm a ńß…ôd…ôk nu s…ô ¶ian makatukuńß tu i tunduńß atu nar~…ĺimaan a tuntunduńßan. kir~…ĺur~…ĺ satu katukuńß tu ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut …ôn…ôm a r~…ĺasubu idaw ku war~…ĺu a mińß ¶aan u sakar~…ĺar~…ĺuman tu ku sur~…ĺitan nida, sas…ôpija nika siidaaj anikaudip, ńßinasur~…ĺit ¶inida tu kinabakańß atu sakaj…ôdis, u sakapańßaj nu igu a ¶udadan. sadikudaj tu nikaudipan, mar~…ĺiŇčatu ¶inida misur~…ĺit tu kanamuńßan kar~…ĺar~…ĺuman a sasur~…ĺitan, siŇčaŇčan na ¶a tu mańßi ¶aaj kija a nisur~…ĺitan, mapapar~…ĺiw atu dumaaj nu misur~…ĺitaj a tad…ômaw. inika udipan nida, ńßatudaaj tu nisur~…ĺitan nida jadańß ku mańßi ¶aaj ku sakatańß…ôkar~…ĺ, ¶aaj namin ka ńßi ¶ańßi ¶a. . maudip ńß…ônaj ¶i sas…ôpija katin…ôŇčan nu tad…ômaw u s…ôz…ôn atu matin…ôŇčaj migiki misur~…ĺitaj tu ¶udad a tad…ômaw, nika katukuńß tu sabaw tu siwa a s…ô ¶ian jadatu i tuŇčduńß ku ŇčaŇčan nida. itini i tusa a bataan a s…ô ¶ian makatukuńß tu ku ŇčaŇčan nida i ja,f…ô, r~…ĺatanmai ¶uo tur~…ĺu a kitidaan, jadańß satu ku matin…ôŇčaj ¶inidaan. . r~…ĺanman ¶ui a zitaj manamuńß tu tin…ôŇč ni sas…ôpija , widuor~…ĺija a zitaj kas…ôn…ôŇčan kasikadan ¶inida, mańßija ¶i ¶iwpuona kanamuńßan ¶i sas…ôpija . pir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan ni sas…ôpija .a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, sumad…ôn mar~…ĺa ka kiniŇčan w…ôr~…ĺ…ôn. sas…ôpija wama nida ¶i j…ôńßan. sas…ôpija mautunasiaj a misiwbaja a tad…ômaw atu ¶igiiŇč, a…ôn…ôŇčan sa i s…ônit…ô Ē~ °…ôd…ô , wina ¶i mar~…ĺi.at…ôn siidaaj nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° a wawa. . sas…ôpija a zitaj pi ¶udadan ¶aaj kaw mańßi ¶aaj ku nipi ¶udad, nika ńßamin nu iŇčk…ôr~…ĺan anisikian tu sapi ¶udad u fur~…ĺi ¶ ku sipu ¶aj, ¶a ¶udadan patid…ôŇč tu r~…ĺatiŇču atu kutinw…ônsia pakai ¶…ôr~…ĺan tu mi ¶udadaj. saka tusa a d…ômiad. . ¶un ¶i misur~…ĺitaj a tad…ômaw musakamu tu nina zitajan a nikajdaan,jadańß kunipatańßkar~…ĺkan tu pa ¶…ôbaaj nu ka kuŇčkuan. sabaw tu war~…ĺu a s…ô ¶ian a kuŇčku ¶i sas…ôpija mar~…ĺa r~…ĺuntun a gagikian tad…ômaw sa mar~…ĺiŇčatu migiki ¶inida.*** j…ôńßan.awpur~…ĺi masakamu ¶i sas…ôpija u inakaaj a sajsajdan. **** ".saan i tusa a bataan a s…ô ¶ian musakamu ku sia ¶…ô ¶i sas…ôpija an amar~…ĺa r~…ĺankai sia ¶un a jar~…ĺisanta.ńßuotun mar~…ĺasajsajdan, ¶i ńßuotun par~…ĺutat…ôŇčaan nida tu tapaŇč ńßan u tin ¶u ¶iw, itida i nipadikudan nida a nakamuan patańß…ôkar~…ĺan nida kina tad…ômaw ¶i "wir~…ĺ…ôn, sas…ôpija". mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu ińß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
S.FORM: == kaudipan śó©ŚĻīÁĒüśīĽ == Sasepiya (kamu nu Hulam: ŤééŚ£ęśĮĒšļě) itida i Yafuhepan' Sete'lafu nilecuha a maudip, sabaw tu walu a mihcaan atu ci Anni. Hase'wia maleacawa, tatulu kuni lecuhan nuheni tu wawa, Susanna', maapiay ci Hamunete' atu ci Cudise . 16 .hedek tu sabaw tu enem katukuh sabaw tu pitu nu tusa a bataan tu pina ci Sasepiya itida i Luntun malingatu malaheci kuni kasikawawan, caay kaw migikiay cinida, matinengay misulit tu gagikian, u kunnei taken cuntuno nu mikabuay a tademaw, nikudan sumad han tu Kuowan cituno. 1613ŚĻīŚ∑¶ŚŹ≥, . cacay a malebut enem a lasubu cacay a bataan idaw ku tulu a mihcaan,ci Sasepiya mituasiw taluma cinida i Yafunhepan Sete'late'hu, nikudan nu tuluay a mihcaan mapatay. nika udipan ni Sasepiya anikilukan caay kahacica, nika udipan nida, palutatengaan tu kiwkay, atu natangahan nida nidaay hakiya anisulitan sa. 1590ŚĻīŚąį1613 . cacay a malebut lima a lasubu siwa a bataan (1590) a mihcaan katukuh i cacay a malebut enem a lasubu cacay a bataan idaw ku tulu (1613) a mihcaan ci Sasepiya a natangahan a sakaadihan nu zitay. sayaway anisulitan nida u pakalaluwahluwahay a gikian atu nu likisi a gikian, i sabaw tu enem a hedek nu secian makatukuh tu i tunduh atu nalimaan a tuntunduhan. kilul satu katukuh tu cacay a malebut enem a lasubu idaw ku walu a mihcaan u sakalaluman tu ku sulitan nida, Sasepiya nika siidaay anikaudip, hinasulit cinida tu kinabakah atu sakayedis, u sakapahay nu igu a cudadan. sadikuday tu nikaudipan, malingatu cinida misulit tu kanamuhan kalaluman a sasulitan, singangan naca tu mahicaay kiya a nisulitan, mapapaliw atu dumaay nu misulitay a tademaw. inika udipan nida, hatudaay tu nisulitan nida yadah ku mahicaay ku sakatahekal, caay namin ka hicahica. . maudip henay ci Sasepiya katinengan nu tademaw u sezen atu matinengay migiki misulitay tu cudad a tademaw, nika katukuh tu sabaw tu siwa a secian yadatu i tungduh ku ngangan nida. itini i tusa a bataan a secian makatukuh tu ku ngangan nida i Ya,Fe, Latanmaicuo tulu a kitidaan, yadah satu ku matinengay cinidaan. . lanmancui a zitay manamuh tu tineng ni Sasepiya , Widuoliya a zitay kasenengan kasikadan cinida, mahiya ci Ciwpuona kanamuhan ci Sasepiya . pilecuhan ni Sasepiya .a luma', sumaden mala ka kiningan Weylen. Sasepiya wama nida ci Yehan. Sasepiya mautunasiay a misiwbaya a tademaw atu cigiing, aenengan sa i Senite'ede , wina ci Mali.aten siidaay nu luma' a wawa. . Sasepiya a zitay picudadan caay kaw mahicaay ku nipicudad, nika hamin nu Ingkelan anisikian tu sapicudad u fulic ku sipucay, cacudadan patideng tu Latingu atu kutinwensia pakaicelan tu micudaday. Saka tusa a demiad. . cunci misulitay a tademaw musakamu tu nina zitayan a nikaydaan,yadah kunipatahkalkan tu pacebaay nu ka kungkuan. sabaw tu walu a secian a kungku ci Sasepiya mala Luntun a gagikian tademaw sa malingatu migiki cinida.476 Yehan.Awpuli masakamu ci Sasepiya u inakaay a saysaydan. šłÄšļõ20 ".saan i tusa a bataan a secian musakamu ku siace ci Sasepiya an amala Lankai siacun a Yalisanta.huotun malasaysaydan, ci Huotun palutatengaan nida tu tapang han u tincuciw, itida i nipadikudan nida a nakamuan patahekalan nida kina tademaw ci "Wilen, Sasepiya". malalitin tu ihekalay atu zumaay a natinengan

¶awa, tatur~…ĺu kuni r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan nuńß…ôni tu wawa, susanna Ē~ °, maapiaj ¶i ńßamun…ôt…ô Ē~ ° atu ¶i ¶udis…ô . ** .ńß…ôd…ôk tu sabaw tu …ôn…ôm katukuńß sabaw tu pitu nu tusa a bataan tu pina ¶i sas…ôpija itida i r~…ĺuntun mar~…ĺiŇčatu mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i kuni kasikawawan, ¶aaj kaw migikiaj ¶inida, matin…ôŇčaj misur~…ĺit tu gagikian, u kunn…ôi tak…ôn ¶untuno nu mikabuaj a tad…ômaw, nikudan sumad ńßan tu kuowan ¶ituno. *******, . ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut …ôn…ôm a r~…ĺasubu ¶a ¶aj a bataan idaw ku tur~…ĺu a mińß ¶aan, ¶i sas…ôpija mituasiw tar~…ĺuma ¶inida i jafunńß…ôpan s…ôt…ô Ē~ °r~…ĺat…ô Ē~ °ńßu, nikudan nu tur~…ĺuaj a mińß ¶aan mapataj. nika udipan ni sas…ôpija anikir~…ĺukan ¶aaj kańßa ¶i ¶a, nika udipan nida, par~…ĺutat…ôŇčaan tu kiwkaj, atu nataŇčańßan nida nidaaj ńßakija mińß ¶aan ¶i sas…ôpija a nataŇčańßan a sakaadińßan nu zitaj. sajawaj anisur~…ĺitan nida u pakar~…ĺar~…ĺuwańßr~…ĺuwańßaj a gikian atu nu r~…ĺikisi a gikian, i sabaw tu …ôn…ôm a ńß…ôd…ôk nu s…ô ¶ian makatukuńß tu i tunduńß atu nar~…ĺimaan a tuntunduńßan. kir~…ĺur~…ĺ satu katukuńß tu ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut …ôn…ôm a r~…ĺasubu idaw ku war~…ĺu a mińß ¶aan u sakar~…ĺar~…ĺuman tu ku sur~…ĺitan nida, sas…ôpija nika siidaaj anikaudip, ńßinasur~…ĺit ¶inida tu kinabakańß atu sakaj…ôdis, u sakapańßaj nu igu a ¶udadan. sadikudaj tu nikaudipan, mar~…ĺiŇčatu ¶inida misur~…ĺit tu kanamuńßan kar~…ĺar~…ĺuman a sasur~…ĺitan, siŇčaŇčan na ¶a tu mańßi ¶aaj kija a nisur~…ĺitan, mapapar~…ĺiw atu dumaaj nu misur~…ĺitaj a tad…ômaw. inika udipan nida, ńßatudaaj tu nisur~…ĺitan nida jadańß ku mańßi ¶aaj ku sakatańß…ôkar~…ĺ, ¶aaj namin ka ńßi ¶ańßi ¶a. . maudip ńß…ônaj ¶i sas…ôpija katin…ôŇčan nu tad…ômaw u s…ôz…ôn atu matin…ôŇčaj migiki misur~…ĺitaj tu ¶udad a tad…ômaw, nika katukuńß tu sabaw tu siwa a s…ô ¶ian jadatu i tuŇčduńß ku ŇčaŇčan nida. itini i tusa a bataan a s…ô ¶ian makatukuńß tu ku ŇčaŇčan nida i ja,f…ô, r~…ĺatanmai ¶uo tur~…ĺu a kitidaan, jadańß satu ku matin…ôŇčaj ¶inidaan. . r~…ĺanman ¶ui a zitaj manamuńß tu tin…ôŇč ni sas…ôpija , widuor~…ĺija a zitaj kas…ôn…ôŇčan kasikadan ¶inida, mańßija ¶i ¶iwpuona kanamuńßan ¶i sas…ôpija . pir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan ni sas…ôpija .a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° a wawa. . sas…ôpija a zitaj pi ¶udadan ¶aaj kaw mańßi ¶aaj ku nipi ¶udad, nika ńßamin nu iŇčk…ôr~…ĺan anisikian tu sapi ¶udad u fur~…ĺi ¶ ku sipu ¶aj, ¶a ¶udadan patid…ôŇč tu r~…ĺatiŇču atu kutinw…ônsia pakai ¶…ôr~…ĺan tu mi ¶udadaj. saka tusa a d…ômiad. . ¶un ¶i misur~…ĺitaj a tad…ômaw musakamu tu nina zitajan a nikajdaan,jadańß kunipatańßkar~…ĺkan tu pa ¶…ôbaaj nu ka kuŇčkuan. nipadikudan nida a nakamuan patańß…ôkar~…ĺan nida kina tad…ômaw ¶i "wir~…ĺ…ôn, sas…ôpija". mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu ińß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
